title: ACCESS CONTROL leads (privileged fn, no modifier)
note: external/public + privileged name, NO only* / inline auth

title: UNCHECKED ERC20 return (silent transfer failure)
note: ERC20 transfer/transferFrom return ignored -> use SafeERC20 (USDT/ZRX return false, not revert)

title: UNCHECKED ERC20 return (silent transfer failure)
note: ERC20 transfer/transferFrom return ignored -> use SafeERC20 (USDT/ZRX return false, not revert)

title: FEE-ON-TRANSFER over-credit (no balance-delta)
note: transferFrom pulls to address(this) but the file never measures a balanceOf(this) delta -> a fee-on-transfer token over-credits; credit the MEASURED received amount

title: SPOT-AMM-AS-ORACLE (flashloan price-manip, #1 DeFiHackLabs class)
note: spot AMM/share source (getReserves/pricePerShare/get_virtual_price/slot0) feeds a borrow/collateral/redeem/reward valuation with NO TWAP/Chainlink -> flashloan price-manip (the #1 DeFiHackLabs class). Verify the price can't be moved in-tx.
